arabicText: وَأَكْمِلِ الْأَدَبَ مَعَ الْإِخْوَانِ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالْحَضْرَةِ دائماً
latinTransliteration: Wa akmilil-adaba ma‘al-ikhwāni fis-sayri wal-ḥaḍrati dā'imā
englishTranslation: And perfect your spiritual etiquette with the brethren in travel and in assemblies always.
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba sàmm téggi and ak say bokk ci yoon wi ak ci mbooloo mi sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ تِجِّ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَيْ بُكِّ سِ يُونْ وِ اَكْ سِ مْبُولُو مِ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: وَكُنْ غَضِيضَ الطَّرْفِ عَنْ عُيُوبِ النَّاسِ جَمِيعاً مَدى الْأَيَّامِ
latinTransliteration: Wa kun ghaḍīḍaṭ-ṭarfi ‘an ‘uyūbin-nāsi jamī‘an madal-ayyām
englishTranslation: And keep your gaze lowered from the faults of all people throughout your days.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga bañ a xool sàkkami jami nit ñi ca sa dund.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ بَنْيْ اَ خُولْ سَࣺكَّمِ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ سَ دُنْدْ

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ حُقُوقَ الشَّيْخِ فِي غَيْبَتِهِ وَحَضْرَتِهِ تَكُنْ رَشِيداً
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ ḥuqūqash-Shaykha fī ghaybatihi wa ḥaḍratihi takun rashīdā
englishTranslation: And guard the rights of the spiritual master in his absence and presence, so that you may be guided.
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَرْ سَ سَ سِرِجْ مُ نِكَّ وَلَّ مُ نِكَّدِ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِنْدِ دِٜجّ

arabicText: وَلَا تُفْشِ أَسْرَارَ الطَّرِيقَةِ لِغَيْرِ أَهْلِهَا مِنَ الْعَامَّةِ
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tufshi asrāraṭ-ṭarīqati li-ghayri ahlihā minal-‘āmmah
englishTranslation: And do not disclose the secrets of the spiritual path to other than its qualified practitioners among the public.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul sotti suturay yoon wi ci ñi andul ak nun ci dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ سُتِّ سُتُرَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ نْيِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ نُنْ سِ دِٜجّ

englishTranslation: And do not disclose the secrets of the spiritual path to other than its qualified practitioners among the public. (Stanza 80)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul sotti suturay yoon wi ci ñi andul ak nun ci dëgg. (Wers 80)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ سُتِّ سُتُرَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ نْيِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ نُنْ سِ دِٜجّ [80]

arabicText: وَأَكْمِلِ الْأَدَبَ مَعَ الْإِخْوَانِ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالْحَضْرَةِ دائماً [81]
latinTransliteration: Wa akmilil-adaba ma‘al-ikhwāni fis-sayri wal-ḥaḍrati dā'imā (81)
englishTranslation: And perfect your spiritual etiquette with the brethren in travel and in assemblies always. (Stanza 81)
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba sàmm téggi and ak say bokk ci yoon wi ak ci mbooloo mi sa sùnek. (Wers 81)
wolofalAjamiScript: فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ تِجِّ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَيْ بُكِّ سِ يُونْ وِ اَكْ سِ مْبُولُو مِ سَ سُنِكْ [81]

arabicText: وَكُنْ غَضِيضَ الطَّرْفِ عَنْ عُيُوبِ النَّاسِ جَمِيعاً مَدى الْأَيَّامِ [82]
latinTransliteration: Wa kun ghaḍīḍaṭ-ṭarfi ‘an ‘uyūbin-nāsi jamī‘an madal-ayyām (82)
englishTranslation: And keep your gaze lowered from the faults of all people throughout your days. (Stanza 82)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga bañ a xool sàkkami jami nit ñi ca sa dund. (Wers 82)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ بَنْيْ اَ خُولْ سَࣺكَّمِ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ سَ دُنْدْ [82]

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ حُقُوقَ الشَّيْخِ فِي غَيْبَتِهِ وَحَضْرَتِهِ تَكُنْ رَشِيداً [83]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ ḥuqūqash-Shaykha fī ghaybatihi wa ḥaḍratihi takun rashīdā (83)
englishTranslation: And guard the rights of the spiritual master in his absence and presence, so that you may be guided. (Stanza 83)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg. (Wers 83)
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَرْ سَ سَ سِرِجْ مُ نِكَّ وَلَّ مُ نِكَّدِ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِنْدِ دِٜجّ [83]

latinTransliteration: Wa akmilil-adaba ma‘al-ikhwāni fis-sayri wal-ḥaḍrati dā'imā (133)
englishTranslation: And perfect your spiritual etiquette with the brethren in travel and in assemblies always. (Stanza 133)
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba sàmm téggi and ak say bokk ci yoon wi ak ci mbooloo mi sa sùnek. (Wers 133)
wolofalAjamiScript: فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ تِجِّ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَيْ بُكِّ سِ يُونْ وِ اَكْ سِ مْبُولُو مِ سَ سُنِكْ [133]

arabicText: وَكُنْ غَضِيضَ الطَّرْفِ عَنْ عُيُوبِ النَّاسِ جَمِيعاً مَدى الْأَيَّامِ [134]
latinTransliteration: Wa kun ghaḍīḍaṭ-ṭarfi ‘an ‘uyūbin-nāsi jamī‘an madal-ayyām (134)
englishTranslation: And keep your gaze lowered from the faults of all people throughout your days. (Stanza 134)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga bañ a xool sàkkami jami nit ñi ca sa dund. (Wers 134)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ بَنْيْ اَ خُولْ سَࣺكَّمِ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ سَ دُنْدْ [134]

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ حُقُوقَ الشَّيْخِ فِي غَيْبَتِهِ وَحَضْرَتِهِ تَكُنْ رَشِيداً [135]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ ḥuqūqash-Shaykha fī ghaybatihi wa ḥaḍratihi takun rashīdā (135)
englishTranslation: And guard the rights of the spiritual master in his absence and presence, so that you may be guided. (Stanza 135)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg. (Wers 135)
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَرْ سَ سَ سِرِجْ مُ نِكَّ وَلَّ مُ نِكَّدِ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِنْدِ دِٜجّ [135]

arabicText: وَلَا تُفْشِ أَسْرَارَ الطَّرِيقَةِ لِغَيْرِ أَهْلِهَا مِنَ الْعَامَّةِ [136]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tufshi asrāraṭ-ṭarīqati li-ghayri ahlihā minal-‘āmmah (136)
englishTranslation: And do not disclose the secrets of the spiritual path to other than its qualified practitioners among the public. (Stanza 136)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul sotti suturay yoon wi ci ñi andul ak nun ci dëgg. (Wers 136)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ سُتِّ سُتُرَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ نْيِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ نُنْ سِ دِٜجّ [136]
